author: Amir G.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A streamlined tool for performance-Driven Teams
description: Overall, my experience with performly talent has been very positive, it's a cost-effective solution that delivers strong value for money, especially for small to life-sized companies. The performance management features are robust .
author: Ammi B.
pros: What stood out the most was its ease of use and inituitive interface . Setting up performance reviews and 360⁰ feedback cycles was simple and efficient. The feedback tools were especially helpful in fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
cons: While performly talent covers performance management well , its candidate process features are somewhat limited . It doesn't offer a full applicant tracking system (ATS) .

description: Performly is a feature-rich and flexible performance management tool that helps organizations monitor and evaluate performance. While it lacks some features and needs improvement, overall, it's a very satisfying solution.
author: 이라 김.
pros: It's great to be able to handle a variety of requests and support my daily tasks effectively.
cons: My biggest disappointment is that it can't be email.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A broad range of features implemented well
author: Ahmed E.
pros: I have been using performly for years as part of my daily routine at the company I work at. The solution has a lot of features. It covers nearly every aspect required for the everyday periodic routine of every employee, and it does it well. From attendance, to vacations, to compensation, to travel, to performance reviews, to announcements ... etc; so many to count. Everything is clear and easy to use.
cons: Taking into account the breadth of features, there is bound to be this rare feature that is not up to par. For example, the notifications menu in the Talent module is lackluster. It does not link to the task, and there is no option to set all as 'read'. In addition, the reports could use more details from the performance submitted.

review_title: A malleable system for administering appraisals of employees' performance
description: With Performly, we have enhanced the concepts of governance and transparency with performance monitoring and evaluation, and it is great that we have been able to exchange feedback and create goals and surveys, which enable us to make improvements to our performance continuously.
author: Abdallah Q.
pros: It is good that with Performly we can hold direct 1X1 sessions to review performance and set a list of goals that should be achieved within a specific period of time, as well as discuss plans that will enable us to achieve them. I like the fact that Performly provides a lot of organized dashboards, which show many analyzes of the various performance measures approved by the organization’s management and through which we can know the amount of improvement in performance and the level of progress in achieving the goals and plans agreed upon between members and their direct managers.
cons: I didn't run into any difficulties with Performly; I was having minor content formatting issues, which got worked around with practice.

review_title: Performly our day to day signing in service
author: Maryam K.
pros: evaluation system planning and objectives easy to use and user friendly
cons: being integrated with other systems it does not work as intended maybe just maybe its a problem with the other integrated SW!

author: Hany B.
pros: Easy objective settings , with due dates, weight , key results and milestones Ability to add different competencies 360 reviews is a great option (Self Review, Sub Review, Reverse Review, Peers Review) feedback feature is very good ( to give an employee a feedback and link it to an objective and set it's visibility too (Public or Private (Manager only) Private (One To One))
cons: It has some usability issues that needs to be fixed ( for example to view previous evaluations for subs , its hard to reach it ) Reports are basic , could be better

review_title: Great changes noticed since we implemented
description: Overall, it was a great experience both as an administrator and user giving and receiving feedback.
author: ESEOSA I.
pros: - Decluttered user interface and product experience - Flexible solution for various scenarios for objectives, key performance indicators (KPIs) and individual team-member goals - Accessible across various devices
cons: Honestly, there isn't much to complain about except maybe the limited features available when offline, which can be a pain for often than you think
